name: Deep Dark Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized heavy saucepan, combine the brown sugar, cocoa, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Mix well with a wooden spoon or spatula.
3. Stir in the water, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Continue cooking over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Serve warm and enjoy immediately.
Nutritional info: 2 tablespoons = 90 calories
Dietary exchange: 1/2 bread, 1 fruit
Source: Pillbury Fast and Healthy Magazine, May-June 1994
